title: Synthetic Review Card: Draft Feedback For Middle School Writing
school_context: A synthetic grade 7 language arts classroom reviewing whether AI may help draft teacher feedback on practice paragraphs.
audience: Teacher, students, families, and local program lead
ai_use_case: The teacher may use AI to suggest possible feedback language for low-stakes practice writing, then review and edit every comment before students see it.
assessment_impact: No grades, placement, discipline, or official records are changed by the AI output.
equity_access_notes: Students can complete the assignment without using AI.
Feedback should not assume paid tools, home broadband, or a specific device.
The teacher checks comments for language clarity and bias before sharing.
human_review_steps: Teacher removes names and unnecessary details before drafting feedback.
Teacher reviews every AI-suggested comment before students receive it.
Teacher stops the workflow if comments are inaccurate, harsh, or confusing.
not_for: Not for detecting whether a student used AI
